results.title: Products and services - Volvo Group
results.content: # Products, services, and solutions. Volvo Group's brand portfolio offers a broad range of products, services and solutions across the transportation, mobility, construction and mining industries. Learn more about the types of products and services Volvo Group offers, below, or check out Our Brands. Volvo Group's truck brands deliver some of the world's best performing products, designed to meet customer needs: from local and regional to long haulage, with many urban applications that help to keep our cities and infrastructure moving. Volvo Group's wide ranging product and service offering means we can help you to build the service or total solution you require for your business. Whether it is financing a new fleet, providing recharging facilities on site or at your distribution hubs, or automating your business with our autonomous solutions, we have the product and service offerings to provide total solutions. Volvo Group is now providing energy solutions: from development of charging and infrastructure solutions to the remanufacturing, refurbishing, repurposing, and recycling state-of-the-art batteries that power our Volvo Group products.

results.title: Our global presence - Volvo Group
results.content: Volvo Group is one of the world’s leading manufacturers of trucks, buses, construction equipment as well as marine and industrial engines. We produce trucks, buses, construction equipment and engines at 19 facilities in Europe - primarily in Sweden, Belgium and France. The big brands for our trucks in North America are Volvo Trucks and Mack Trucks, while for buses it is Volvo Buses, Prevost and Nova Bus. We have production facilities at ten sites. In the USA we build trucks, engines, construction equipment and buses. In Canada and Mexico we build buses, and we are in the process of building a new truck plant for the North American market in Mexico. In South Africa our Volvo Trucks and Renault Trucks models are assembled in a joint factory in Durban. In India production is located mainly in Bangalore, where we build buses, trucks and construction equipment. Volvo Construction Equipment has a production plant in Changwon, South Korea.

results.title: Our story - Volvo Cars
results.content: From the very outset Volvo Cars has been a brand for people who care about the world we live in and the people around us. We want to provide you with the freedom to move in a personal, sustainable and safe way. With our deep understanding of human behaviour we develop products that understand, support and protect people in and around the car. We want to disrupt the auto industry and be a leader in safety, sustainability, online business and set a new global people standard. Our long term aim is to become a fully electric car company. With five fully electric cars (EVs) already on the market and another five models in development, full electrification is a key pillar of our product strategy. ## Volvo Car Group – meet the family. Our group structure includes Volvo Cars, software company Zenseact and HaleyTek, developer for Android-powered infotainment systems. Volvo Car Group also includes stakes in our strategic affiliate, the electric performance brand Polestar (18%).
